fieldResolution.detail: Field resolution is graded by the base harness, not the critic slice.

reasoning.detail: The critic fired 11 real bedrock calls, one per candidate finding.

outcomes.label: A · pseudoreplication (genuine)
outcomes.justification: The naive cell-level p-value of 2.4e-7 collapses to an honest replicate-level p-value of 0.775 when properly aggregated across 4 donors, which is far above the 0.05 threshold and indicates the apparent effect does not survive correction for pseudoreplication.

outcomes.label: A · double dipping (genuine)
outcomes.keysOn: holdAUC=0.58, markerCount=4, Markers holding=0/4, Held-out cells=560
outcomes.justification: With 560 held-out cells the split is adequately powered, yet the held-out AUC dropped to 0.58 (near chance) and zero of four markers replicated, indicating the marker program does not generalize beyond the discovery partition.

outcomes.label: A · fragility, Effector (genuine)
outcomes.justification: A stability of 0% means the Effector state never forms as a discrete cluster at any resolution setting in the sweep, so the claim that it is a distinct reproducible cell state rests entirely on an arbitrary clustering choice with no support across the parameter range.

outcomes.label: A · confounding (genuine)
outcomes.keysOn: Cramer's V: 1.00, Separable: no, Design: rank deficient
outcomes.justification: The Cramer's V of 1.00 indicates perfect collinearity between the grouping variable (condition) and the technical variable (lane), and the design matrix is rank deficient, meaning the biological effect of IL2RA knockdown cannot be statistically separated from the lane effect.

outcomes.label: B · pseudoreplication (genuine, renamed columns)
outcomes.justification: The naive cell-level p-value of 1.3e-6 collapses to an honest replicate-level p-value of 0.72 when properly aggregated to the 6 donor units, which is far above the 0.05 threshold and indicates the apparent significance was driven by treating non-independent cells as replicates rather than a true biological effect.

outcomes.label: B · confounding (genuine, renamed columns)
outcomes.justification: Cramer's V of 1.00 indicates perfect collinearity between treatment and batch, and the rank-deficient design confirms these effects cannot be separated statistically, so any observed treatment effect is indistinguishable from the batch effect.

outcomes.label: C · pseudoreplication (over-fired flag)
outcomes.justification: The honest replicate-level p-value of 4.8e-06 is far below the 0.05 threshold, meaning the effect survives the pseudobulk test and this is not pseudoreplication.

outcomes.label: C · double dipping (over-fired flag)
outcomes.justification: The held-out AUC is 1.00, identical to the discovery AUC, and all 4 markers hold on the independent split with 570 held-out cells, so there is no separation collapse to flag.

outcomes.label: C · fragility (over-fired flag)
outcomes.justification: The cluster appears at every resolution setting in the sweep, showing perfect stability across the parameter range, so the fragility flag is not warranted.

outcomes.label: C · confounding (over-fired flag)
outcomes.justification: Cramer's V of 0.03 indicates near-zero association between the grouping variable and the technical nuisance variable, the design matrix is full rank, and the columns are explicitly separable, so there is no confounding that would prevent estimating the condition effect.

outcomes.label: C · double dipping (underpowered split)
outcomes.justification: With only 14 held-out cells and 2 markers tested, the split lacks statistical power to distinguish true separation loss from sampling noise, so the AUC drop from 0.74 to 0.59 cannot be interpreted as reliable evidence of double-dipping.

selfTests.name: rubber-stamp critic is caught
selfTests.detail: A rubber-stamp critic failed to veto the over-fires and downgrade the underpowered split, so the harness rejects it.

selfTests.name: a failed critic call fails safe toward showing
selfTests.detail: When the critic call throws, genuine findings stay flagged (shown by default), never hidden.
